creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
There is a list of FreeBSD MLs in the section C.2 of FreeBSD Handbook (https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/eresources/#eresources-mail). And freebsd-ports-announce ML is included in it. If someone click the link for the ML, then he is navigated to following URL.

http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports-announce

But access to it is redirected to following URL.

https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-ports

As the URL suggests it is page that explain how to (subscribe|unsbscribe) freebsd-ports ML. And as a result, currently user can't (subscribe|unsbscribe|change setting of) freebsd-ports-announce ML
